zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Bromwich於大約1315年出生在英國瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其時，她的父親Anselme de Bromwich32歲，母親Alice de Aston of Warwickshire28歲。她於大約1338年與Ralph de Arden在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1375年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Bromwich于大约1315年出生在英国瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其时，她的父亲Anselme de Bromwich32岁，母亲Alice de Aston of Warwickshire28岁。她于大约1338年与Ralph de Arden在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1375年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Bromwich was born about 1315, in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, her father, Anselme de Bromwich, was 32 and her mother, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, was 28. She married Ralph de Arden about 1338, in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1375, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Bromwich est née environ 1315, à Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Anselme de Bromwich, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Arden environ 1338, à Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1375, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Bromwich um 1315 in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anselme de Bromwich 32 und ihre Mutter Alice de Aston of Warwickshire 28. Sie hat um 1338 in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Arden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Bromwich è nata il circa 1315 nel Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Anselme de Bromwich, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Arden circa 1338, nel Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1375, nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bromwichが約1315年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル ブロムウィチで生まれた時，父Anselme de Bromwichは32歳，母Alice de Aston of Warwickshireは28歳であった。約1338年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル ブロムウィチでRalph de Ardenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1375年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Bromwich(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 워윅실르 카스틀 브롬위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anselme de Bromwich(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Aston of Warwickshire(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 카스틀 브롬위치에서 Ralph de Arden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Bromwich nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anselme de Bromwich, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Arden aproximadamente 1338, em Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1375, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Bromwich родилась около 1315 г. в местности кастл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Anselme de Bromwich было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Arden около 1338 г. в местности кастл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1375 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Bromwich nació aproximadamente 1315, en Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Anselme de Bromwich, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ralph de Arden aproximadamente 1338, en Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1375, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
